message:
test(proptest): add 31 property tests for connector_bundles types and behavioral invariants

Add proptest_connector_bundles.rs with comprehensive coverage:
- 14 serde roundtrip tests (BundleTier, BundleCategory, BundleConnectorEntry,
  ConnectorBundle, IngestionOutcome, IngestionPipelineConfig, IngestionTelemetry,
  IngestionTelemetrySnapshot, BundleAuditAction, BundleAuditEntry,
  BundleRegistryConfig, BundleRegistryTelemetry, BundleRegistrySnapshot,
  BundleValidationResult)
- 5 Display property tests (non-empty output, valid/INVALID consistency)
- 12 behavioral invariant tests (Ord totality, trust monotonicity, capability
  dedup, count arithmetic, validation rules, registry operations, audit log
  bounding, config defaults)

Also add PartialEq derives to ConnectorGovernorConfig and sub-configs
(TokenBucketConfig gets PartialEq+Eq; QuotaConfig, CostBudgetConfig,
QueueBackpressureConfig get PartialEq only due to f64 fields).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
